'''ât-r-w''' ('''kataraw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:headquarter|headquarter]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-r-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headquarter|headquarter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-r-w
|-
! Lemma
| kataraw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitaraw|thitaraw]] || [[word:jitaraw|jitaraw]] || [[word:shitaraw|shitaraw]] || [[word:kitaraw|kitaraw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutaraw|thuthutaraw]] || [[word:jujutaraw|jujutaraw]] || [[word:shushutaraw|shushutaraw]] || [[word:kukutaraw|kukutaraw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutaraw|thutaraw]] || [[word:jutaraw|jutaraw]] || [[word:shutaraw|shutaraw]] || [[word:kutaraw|kutaraw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutaraw|thutaraw]] || [[word:jutaraw|jutaraw]] || [[word:shutaraw|shutaraw]] || [[word:kutaraw|kutaraw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetaraw|thetaraw]] || [[word:jetaraw|jetaraw]] || [[word:shetaraw|shetaraw]] || [[word:ketaraw|ketaraw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotaraw|thothotaraw]] || [[word:jojotaraw|jojotaraw]] || [[word:shoshotaraw|shoshotaraw]] || [[word:kokotaraw|kokotaraw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotaraw|thotaraw]] || [[word:jotaraw|jotaraw]] || [[word:shotaraw|shotaraw]] || [[word:kotaraw|kotaraw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotaraw|thotaraw]] || [[word:jotaraw|jotaraw]] || [[word:shotaraw|shotaraw]] || [[word:kotaraw|kotaraw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtaraw|thĂŠtaraw]] || [[word:jĂŠtaraw|jĂŠtaraw]] || [[word:shĂŠtaraw|shĂŠtaraw]] || [[word:kĂŠtaraw|kĂŠtaraw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathataraw|thathataraw]] || [[word:jajataraw|jajataraw]] || [[word:shashataraw|shashataraw]] || [[word:kakataraw|kakataraw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thataraw|thataraw]] || [[word:jataraw|jataraw]] || [[word:shataraw|shataraw]] || [[word:kataraw|kataraw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thataraw|thataraw]] || [[word:jataraw|jataraw]] || [[word:shataraw|shataraw]] || [[word:kataraw|kataraw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shataraw|shataraw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshataraw|goshataraw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishataraw|gokishataraw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatarawnĂŒ|shatarawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatarawnknĂŒ|goshatarawnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatarawnĂŒ|gokishatarawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatarawshĂ«|shatarawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatarawnkshĂ«|goshatarawnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatarawshĂ«|gokishatarawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatarawro|shatarawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatarawnkro|goshatarawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatarawro|gokishatarawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatarawmu|shatarawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatarawnkmu|goshatarawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatarawmu|gokishatarawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatarawsher|shatarawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatarawnksher|goshatarawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatarawsher|gokishatarawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatarawng|shatarawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatarawnkng|goshatarawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatarawng|gokishatarawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatarawya|shatarawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatarawnkya|goshatarawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatarawya|gokishatarawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatarawyam|shatarawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatarawnkyam|goshatarawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatarawyam|gokishatarawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatarawnĂŒshĂ«|shatarawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatarawnknĂŒshĂ«|goshatarawnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatarawnĂŒshĂ«|gokishatarawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatarawnĂŒro|shatarawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatarawnknĂŒro|goshatarawnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatarawnĂŒro|gokishatarawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatarawnĂŒmu|shatarawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatarawnknĂŒmu|goshatarawnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatarawnĂŒmu|gokishatarawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatarawshĂ«nĂŒ|shatarawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatarawnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatarawnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatarawshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatarawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatarawshĂ«ro|shatarawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatarawnkshĂ«ro|goshatarawnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatarawshĂ«ro|gokishatarawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatarawshĂ«mu|shatarawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatarawnkshĂ«mu|goshatarawnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatarawshĂ«mu|gokishatarawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatarawronĂŒ|shatarawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatarawnkronĂŒ|goshatarawnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatarawronĂŒ|gokishatarawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatarawroshĂ«|shatarawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatarawnkroshĂ«|goshatarawnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatarawroshĂ«|gokishatarawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatarawromu|shatarawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatarawnkromu|goshatarawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatarawromu|gokishatarawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatarawmunĂŒ|shatarawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatarawnkmunĂŒ|goshatarawnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatarawmunĂŒ|gokishatarawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatarawmushĂ«|shatarawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatarawnkmushĂ«|goshatarawnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatarawmushĂ«|gokishatarawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatarawmuro|shatarawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatarawnkmuro|goshatarawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatarawmuro|gokishatarawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
